---
name: Memory bank standards
description: Rules for recording concise project learnings, decisions, and reusable context without storing secrets.
applyTo: "**/*.md"
---

# Memory bank standards

- Record only durable project facts, decisions, commands, and lessons learned.
- Keep notes short and easy to scan.
- Do not store secrets, tokens, credentials, personal data, or production-only details.
- Separate facts from assumptions.
- Prefer updating existing notes over creating duplicates.
- Include validation commands or known-safe workflows when they help future agents.
